title: Portable Mini Fan 360 Degree Wind Direction Bladeless Push Button Outdoor Lavalier Fan USB Rechargeable Handheld
detail_text: Packaging: 1 Portable fan 1 USB Cable Note: Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed on the pictures. Thank you! Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement. Product Description: ● Type: Mini Fan With Wearable Clip ● Material: Durable ABS ● Color: White/Green/Pink ● Rechargeable battery interface: USB Type-C ● Charging time: about 66 minutes ● Use time: about 2-5 hours ● Battery capacity: 900mAh ● Rated voltage: 5V ● Power: 2.1W ● Three adjustable fan speed ● Suitable for indoors and outdoors activities, baby stroller, camping, hiking etc. ● Weight: 200g ● Size: 6.5cm x 7.4cm x 5cm ● Box Size: 9.2cm x 8cm x 7.3cm ● Note: Avoid switching on the fan when charging, to preserve the battery life.
detail_html:
Packaging:


1 Portable fan


1 USB Cable


Note:


Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed on the pictures. Thank you!


Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.




Product Description:


● Type: Mini Fan With Wearable Clip


● Material: Durable ABS


● Color: White/Green/Pink


● Rechargeable battery interface: USB Type-C


● Charging time: about 66 minutes


● Use time: about 2-5 hours


● Battery capacity: 900mAh


● Rated voltage: 5V


● Power: 2.1W


● Three adjustable fan speed


● Suitable for indoors and outdoors activities, baby stroller, camping, hiking etc.


● Weight: 200g


● Size: 6.5cm x 7.4cm x 5cm


● Box Size: 9.2cm x 8cm x 7.3cm


● Note: Avoid switching on the fan when charging, to preserve the battery life.

● Rechargeable battery interface: USB Type-C


● Charging time: about 66 minutes


● Use time: about 2-5 hours


● Battery capacity: 900mAh


● Rated voltage: 5V


● Power: 2.1W


● Three adjustable fan speed


● Suitable for indoors and outdoors activities, baby stroller, camping, hiking etc.


● Weight: 200g


● Size: 6.5cm x 7.4cm x 5cm


● Box Size: 9.2cm x 8cm x 7.3cm


● Note: Avoid switching on the fan when charging, to preserve the battery life.

Includes a dense mesh finger-proof guard for safety and a thickened reinforced base to prevent vibration. 130° flexible angle adjustment with manual button control and an extended 3m national standard power cord. detail_text: Specifications BrandIonaSKU474764582_SGAMZ-12958818715Fan FeaturesOscillating,Variable Speed SettingsNumber of Blades5Power Consumption45Blade Length (inch)12Fan Blade MaterialsPlasticModelGLTF120 What’s in the box IONA GLTF120 12 ELECTRIC TABLE FAN Highlights Features: 3 Versatile Speed Settings Large air diffusion Powerful air flow with 5 aero design fan blades Oscillation and Automatic Control Adjustable Tilt Description Welcome to IONA, We provide our customers with an extensive range of great value products that satisfy quality and efficiency bringing convenience to your life. We guarantee 100% authenticity and ensure the highest make in terms of quality and safety for your worry-free use. Shopping doesn't get any easier than this, so get started today! IONA 12 Inch Electric Table Fan Small Desk Fan - GLTF120 Simple yet elegant designed table fan with basic functions. Whisper quiet operations does not disturb you while you are working and consumes less power. The three wind speed option and wide oscillation makes it more flexible according to your needs. ✨ Key Features: -3 Versatile Speed Settings -Large air diffusion -Powerful air flow with 5 aero design fan blades -Oscillation and Automatic Control -Adjustable Tilt ⚙️ Specification: Voltage: 220-240V 50/60Hz 45W Barcode: 8886432504079 Product Dimension: L36 x W24 x H46 cm Net Weight: 2.3kg Speed 1 : 11.2km/h Speed 2 : 14km/h Speed 3 : 15km/h ✅ 1 Year Local Warranty ✅ Safety Mark: 161747-12 ✅ 2 Pin SG Plug 🛡️ Warranty: 1. If there is a problem with the product, please contact us, we’ll resolve the problem as soon as possible. 2. If you receive an incorrect or defective item, please contact us, we’ll provide 1-to-1 exchange within 14 days. 3. Warranty is valid for 12 months from the Date of Purchase 🚚 Shipping & Delivery: 1. All products are thoroughly checked before shipment. 2. Orders placed from Monday to Thursday, we will shipping out on the next day morning. 3. Orders placed from Friday to Sunday, we will shipping out on the following Monday. 👩‍💻 After Sales Service If you have any problems or questions, please contact us by Live Chat. Our live agent will here to help you with your inquiry. Your feedback is highly appreciated and will help us serve you better. Thanks for shopping with us!!! WE HOPE YOU ENJOY OUR PRODUCTS. product.desc:
There are two versions of this fan：

✨USB Plug-in Version（插电款）🔌: Needs to be kept plugged in at all times when in use. (Note: will not work if not plugged in !!!)

✨Rechargeable Version（无线款）🔋: Built-in rechargeable battery (Doesn't need to be plugged in to use)
product.highlights:
• There are two installation methods, wall mounted and desktop, which do not require drilling for installation.
  • Cylindrical wind gathering design, turbine blades, ultra long wind distance, strong wind force.
  • Adjust the angle 180 °, rotate freely, and adjust the appropriate angle.
  • Three adjustable wind speeds.
  • Ultra quiet, operating sound below 60 decibels.
  • Equipped with a 4000mAh rechargeable battery, it can be used for 10 hours at 1st wind speed, 7 hours at 2nd wind speed, and 3 hours at 3rd wind speed.
  • Suitable for multiple scenarios such as kitchen, office, dormitory, bedroom, living room, etc.
  • Material: Plastic
  • Product size: 20.5 * 18.9 * 12.8cm
  • Packaging list: 1 fan, 1 charging cable, and 1 instruction manual.

aiTexts: This wireless rechargeable desk fan features 90° auto-rotation and 90° up/down adjustable angles for flexible airflow.
It offers 4 wind speeds from gentle breeze to strong wind, powered by a quiet, powerful motor.
The fan includes a large 4000mAh battery providing up to 5 hours of use and supports USB Type-C and Micro USB charging.
Made of durable ABS with removable front cover for easy cleaning and a non-slip base for stable placement.
Compact and lightweight design makes it ideal for office, home, dorm, or outdoor use.

product.highlights:
• Portable and upright, suitable for home, office, and outdoor use;
  • New energy large capacity 6000mAh battery, portable anytime, anywhere, with long battery life
  • Compact and lightweight, easy to carry, won't take up space at home or in the office
  • Adopting a three-phase high-speed motor, with low energy consumption, low noise, and a speed increase of 10 times, it brings stable and strong wind power
  • Stepless speed regulation, adjustable wind speed up and down, 100 wind speed digital frequency display

title: Portable High Speed Cooling Handheld Fan 3600mAh Rechargeable 100 Wind Speeds Adjustable Mini Foldable Air Cooling Turbo Fan
detail_text: Welcome to HUMI store. Features: 【Powerful and Portable】： Our handheld fan features a robust 3600mAh battery for reliable cooling on the go. Take it with you wherever you need a refreshing breeze. 【Innovative Ice-Cool Technology】： Stay cool in the heat with our fan's unique ice-cooling function, reducing surface temperature to as low as 18°C. It's not just a breeze; it's a cold gust that brings instant relief from the summer sun, ideal for those scorching days or when you need a quick cool-down after exercise. 【Adjustable Speeds】： Tailor your cooling experience with 100 adjustable speed settings, thanks to our fan's seamless variable speed control. Whether you need a gentle whisper or a strong gust, find your perfect comfort level with ease. 【Unique Appearance】： The ultra-small foldable body design and ultra-light weight you to easily put it in your pocket or bag, saying goodbye to bulky traditional fans and easily achieving mobile cooling. The pocket fan also comes with an anti-lost lanyard, so no matter where you go, this handheld portable turbo fan ensures you'll stay comfortable all day long. 【Perfect Summer GIFT 】： The mini portable fan looks great and is suitable for men, women and children. It is widely used in work, study, travel and other scenarios. The small fan will become your cooling companion for travel and outdoor sports. Parameters Name: Cooling Handheld Fan Brand: KINSCOTER Size: 59*58.5*137mm (2.32*2.32*5.39inch) Net weight: 235g Rated power: ≤7.5W Rated input: DC5.0V/2.0A Battery capacity: 3600mAh Usage time: Up to 6 hours Function: 100 gears infinitely adjustable wind power, power display, ice coolingIce temperature: as low as 18℃ Product material: ABS/PC/SUS Electronic components Certification: ce, RoHS Package list 1x Fan 1 x Lanyard 1 x Charging Cable 1 x Instruction Manual
detail_html:
Welcome to HUMI store.


Features:

【Powerful and Portable】：

Our handheld fan features a robust 3600mAh battery for reliable cooling on the go. Take it with you wherever you need a refreshing breeze.

【Innovative Ice-Cool Technology】：

Stay cool in the heat with our fan's unique ice-cooling function, reducing surface temperature to as low as 18°C. It's not just a breeze; it's a cold gust that brings instant relief from the summer sun, ideal for those scorching days or when you need a quick cool-down after exercise.

【Adjustable Speeds】：

Tailor your cooling experience with 100 adjustable speed settings, thanks to our fan's seamless variable speed control. Whether you need a gentle whisper or a strong gust, find your perfect comfort level with ease.

【Unique Appearance】：

The ultra-small foldable body design and ultra-light weight you to easily put it in your pocket or bag, saying goodbye to bulky traditional fans and easily achieving mobile cooling. The pocket fan also comes with an anti-lost lanyard, so no matter where you go, this handheld portable turbo fan ensures you'll stay comfortable all day long.

【Perfect Summer GIFT 】：

The mini portable fan looks great and is suitable for men, women and children. It is widely used in work, study, travel and other scenarios. The small fan will become your cooling companion for travel and outdoor sports.

Parameters

Name: Cooling Handheld Fan

Brand: KINSCOTER

Size: 59*58.5*137mm (2.32*2.32*5.39inch)

Net weight: 235g

Rated power: ≤7.5W

Rated input: DC5.0V/2.0A

Battery capacity: 3600mAh

Usage time: Up to 6 hours

Function: 100 gears infinitely adjustable wind power, power display, ice coolingIce

temperature: as low as 18℃

Product material: ABS/PC/SUS Electronic components

Certification: ce, RoHS

Package list

1x Fan

1 x Lanyard

1 x Charging Cable

1 x Instruction Manual

aiTexts: This portable handheld fan offers powerful, adjustable cooling with up to 100 wind speed settings to suit your comfort needs.
Equipped with a robust 3600mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers long-lasting airflow for outdoor activities, work, or travel.
Its innovative ice-cooling technology reduces surface temperature to as low as 18°C, providing instant relief from heat.
The mini, foldable design makes it easy to carry in your pocket or bag, complemented by an anti-lost lanyard for convenience.
Ideal for men, women, and children, this fan is perfect for staying cool during summer days or post-exercise refreshment.

title: Portable Silent Wall-Mounted Mini Fan
detail_text: Specifications SKU13677600659_SGAMZ-124466166010Number of Blades3 bladesModel9844Input Voltage5 vWeight0.3 kgMounting TypeWall MountFan FeaturesEnergy EfficientLength196 mmWidth193 mmControl MethodRemote ControlHeight71 mmOscillationNo Highlights This Portable Silent Wall-Mounted Mini Fan features a space-saving wall-mount design that requires no drilling. It supports both hanging and standing modes, making it versatile for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, offices, and outdoor use. Equipped with a quiet 3-blade system and three adjustable wind speeds, it ensures energy-efficient, stable airflow without oscillation. Includes a remote control for convenient operation, USB charging for portability, and a long-lasting battery for extended use. Additional features include variable frequency cooling and a gentle night-light for ambiance and comfort. Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here VIEW MORE

aiTexts: This mini portable hand fan features a powerful cooling system that delivers up to 10m/s wind speed with 100 adjustable levels, ensuring a customized breeze for any situation.
Its advanced four-core cooling engine provides natural, sweat-free comfort, ideal for outdoor activities, travel, and office use.
Equipped with a quiet, brushless magnetic levitation motor and a long-lasting AI-powered battery, it offers extended, silent operation.
The compact, lightweight design fits easily in bags, making it a stylish and convenient companion on the go.
Safety is enhanced with an encrypted grille and Type-C charging, catering to users valuing convenience, performance, and security.

detail_text: Long-Lasting Battery Life Experience uninterrupted cooling with the NIKOLATOY Jetfan II, featuring a super long-lasting battery life for extended use. Static Model Toy Beyond its practical use, the Jetfan II doubles as a static model toy, adding a touch of creativity to your workspace. Second Generation Improvement The Jetfan II is an upgraded version, offering improved performance and design over its predecessor. Office Essential Perfect for office environments, the Jetfan II provides a refreshing breeze, enhancing productivity and comfort. Desktop Fan Design This innovative desktop fan design by NIKOLATOY is not just functional but also serves as a creative centerpiece in your office space.

title: Mini Desktop Metal Fan
detail_text: Versatile Size Options Available in 4, 6, and 8-inch sizes, this mini fan offers versatility to suit various spaces and cooling needs. Choose the size that best fits your requirements. Portable and Lightweight Despite its sturdy build, this mini fan is lightweight and portable. It's easy to carry around, making it ideal for on-the-go use or travel. Durable Material Crafted from durable iron and metal aluminum leaves, this fan promises longevity and resistance to wear and tear. It's designed to last through multiple uses. Compact Design This mini fan boasts a compact design, making it perfect for desktop use. Its small size doesn't compromise on air circulation, ensuring a cool breeze right where you need it. Black Color The sleek black color of this mini fan adds a touch of sophistication to any setting. Its neutral hue blends seamlessly with most decor styles.
detail_html:
Versatile Size Options



Available in 4, 6, and 8-inch sizes, this mini fan offers versatility to suit various spaces and cooling needs. Choose the size that best fits your requirements.






Portable and Lightweight



Despite its sturdy build, this mini fan is lightweight and portable. It's easy to carry around, making it ideal for on-the-go use or travel.






Durable Material



Crafted from durable iron and metal aluminum leaves, this fan promises longevity and resistance to wear and tear. It's designed to last through multiple uses.






Compact Design



This mini fan boasts a compact design, making it perfect for desktop use. Its small size doesn't compromise on air circulation, ensuring a cool breeze right where you need it.






Black Color



The sleek black color of this mini fan adds a touch of sophistication to any setting. Its neutral hue blends seamlessly with most decor styles.

aiTexts: The Eurobird Mini Fan is a versatile cooling solution designed for kitchen and bathroom use.
Made from durable ABS plastic, it features USB rechargeable power with no need for an adapter when used with a China plug.
Equipped with a Dual-Core ICE Cooling Chip and V3 Ultra-High-Speed Turbo Engine, it provides instant cold air with up to 96% efficiency, cooling down to -26°C.
It offers quiet operation, 5-speed wind adjustment, and oscillation for personalized comfort.
The fan can be wall-mounted or placed on a desktop and includes a washable mesh cover for easy hygiene maintenance.

detail_html:
**MUST READ**

The indicator light will turn on after charging for at least 30 minutes. For the first use, a full charge takes 5 hours. Before claiming the fan is faulty, please ensure you have charged it for at least 5 hours.

*Performance is based on a controlled environment. Do note that performance and compatibility may vary from specification advertised.

[ IMPORTANT PLEASE READ ]

WARRANTY POLICY:

product.highlights:
• Rapid Cooling Performance:Adopts semiconductor refrigeration & ice porcelain cooling technology, delivers instant cooling effect to quickly relieve heat in hot weather.
  • Multi-purpose Clip Design:Built-in flexible clip allows you to hang it on waist or neck, or place it on desk, portable for indoor and outdoor use.
  • LED Smart Digital Display:Equipped with mirror LED screen, clearly shows remaining battery level and wind speed for easy real-time checking.
  • Premium Body Material:Made of high-quality ABS+PC material with frosted skin-friendly surface. Polar white color matches stylish mirror panel, comfortable to hold.
  • Stable Clip & Convenient Charging:Wide elastic back clip holds firmly without falling off. Supports Type-C charging, battery percentage displayed directly on LED screen.

title: PowerPac Stand Fan Standing fan (PPFS30/PPFS50/PPFS300R/PPFS616/PPMSF40/MC40)
detail_text: Specifications BrandPowerPacSKU153417769_SGAMZ-9700706790Oscillation Angle180°Is BladelessNoNo. of Speeds2-SpeedPower Consumption60 WModelppfs30Fan FeaturesTilting,Safety Features,Silent Mode,Rust Proof Body,Rechargeable,Auto Shutter,Misting,Variable Speed Settings,Oscillating,LED Light,backlit displayFan Blade MaterialsPlasticControl MethodManual Button/Switch ControlReturn Policy-1 What’s in the box Powerpac Electrical Stand Fan1x1 Qualification License Type SG_CPSO License Code Highlights Model: PPFS30-Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 4 speed setting, oscillation with timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Voltage 220-240V, 50/60Hz, Power 60W, Safety Mark 190358-24, Packaging size 51x57x14cm Model: PPFS50 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 4 speed setting, oscillation with 1hr timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Enhance double ring safety guard, 3 power blades, Safety Mark 200521-24 Model: PPFS300R - Remote control, 3 power blade, Timer & wind type selection, 3 speed setting with oscillation, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louver for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Power consumption : 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50Hz, Safety Mark 180670-24 Model: PPFS616 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, Aluminium fan blades with piano switch, 3 speed setting, oscillation with 1hr timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50-60Hz, Safety Mark 150587-12 Model: PPMSF40 - Built-in thermal fuse protection against overheating, 3 speed setting with oscillation, High velocity motor for maximum air circulation, Tilt adjustment for wider fan coverage, Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, Solid construction for high performance and stability, 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50Hz, 465 x 160 x 595mm Model: MC40 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 3 speed setting, oscillation, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable height, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Energy saving, save on your utility bill , Power 40 Watts, Safety Mark 131660-12 Important note: The base of the fan is made out of unrefined, recycled materials with consideration for the environment, hence it is normal for it to look rough and/or a bit dirty. product.highlights:
• Model: PPFS30-Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 4 speed setting, oscillation with timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Voltage 220-240V, 50/60Hz, Power 60W, Safety Mark 190358-24, Packaging size 51x57x14cm
  • Model: PPFS50 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 4 speed setting, oscillation with 1hr timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Enhance double ring safety guard, 3 power blades, Safety Mark 200521-24
  • Model: PPFS300R - Remote control, 3 power blade, Timer & wind type selection, 3 speed setting with oscillation, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louver for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, Power consumption : 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50Hz, Safety Mark 180670-24
  • Model: PPFS616 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, Aluminium fan blades with piano switch, 3 speed setting, oscillation with 1hr timer, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Adjustable height, Enhance double ring safety guard, Energy saving, save on your utility bill, 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50-60Hz, Safety Mark 150587-12
  • Model: PPMSF40 - Built-in thermal fuse protection against overheating, 3 speed setting with oscillation, High velocity motor for maximum air circulation, Tilt adjustment for wider fan coverage, Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, Solid construction for high performance and stability, 60 Watts . 220V-240V . 50Hz, 465 x 160 x 595mm
  • Model: MC40 - Concentrated air flow for optimum cooling and air coverage, 3 speed setting, oscillation, Built in thermal protection against overheating, Adjustable height, Adjustable louvre for optimum wind circulation, Energy saving, save on your utility bill , Power 40 Watts, Safety Mark 131660-12
  • Important note: The base of the fan is made out of unrefined, recycled materials with consideration for the environment, hence it is normal for it to look rough and/or a bit dirty.

Advantages: angle adjustment; gentle winds; Energy saving and power saving; bass noise reduction; Simple installation; Solid and durable!

Brand: YANGZI

Motor type: AC type

Applicable occasions: universal

Control mode: push-button type

Power supply mode: power supply type

3C certification certificate number: 2022180702030397

Rated power: 20W

Product voltage: 220V/50Hz

Fan blade material: high quality plastic

Applicable occasions: student/staff dormitory, kitchen, bathroom, baby room, vegetable market, etc.!

Peculiarity:

1. Small design, does not occupy space, suitable for different scenarios!

2. Use in the kitchen to drive away the stuffy air.

3. Toilet use. When you go to the bathroom, you can play with your mobile phone and enjoy the cool breeze!

4. Sticker installation, no damage to the wall, simple installation.

5. Silent design, accompany your baby to sleep all night. Quiet and soft, as gentle as a mother's hand fan!

6. Multi-angle adjustment. Easily adjust the angle you need.

Details: heat dissipation hole design; One-key switch; Plug the fan blades!

Note:

  1. This electric fan cannot rotate automatically and can only be manually adjusted in angle; And it only has one wind speed range.
  2. If the item you receive is damaged or has other defects, please feel free to contact us at any time! We will provide you with a satisfactory solution!

title: Warmco Mini USB Desk Fan Portable USB-C Fan 3-Speed Adjustable Quiet Small Personal Cooling Fan 180° Rotation for Home Travel
detail_text: About this item: USB Cord Powered Fan: Stay cool with our lightweight USB fan! Powered by any USB-A port, it connects easily to chargers, laptops, desktops, or power banks. Enjoy worry-free operation without batteries, making it an eco-friendly and convenient cooling solution Adjustable 3 Speeds: This sleek and compact USB fan features three adjustable speeds and a unique 5-blade design for optimal airflow. Perfect for your desk, it includes a foldable 180° support stand, allowing you to place it on any surface or hang it up for versatile cooling options Ultra-Thin and Stylish Design: This battery-free USB fan measures 6.5 x 5.3 x 1.57 inches. Engineered with modern aesthetics in mind, it features a foldable stand for easy storage and portability. The sleek design seamlessly complements any home or office decor Quiet Operation for Focused Work: Create a comfortable environment with our whisper-quiet USB desk fan. Perfect for studying or working, it ensures you stay cool without distracting noise. Ideal for both home and office settings where concentration is essential Complete Package: Your purchase includes one premium USB desk fan with a detailed user manual and a Type C charging cable. The versatile design makes it perfect for use at home, office, or while traveling. Experience efficient cooling wherever you need it
detail_html:
About this item:


USB Cord Powered Fan: Stay cool with our lightweight USB fan! Powered by any USB-A port, it connects easily to chargers, laptops, desktops, or power banks. Enjoy worry-free operation without batteries, making it an eco-friendly and convenient cooling solution


Adjustable 3 Speeds: This sleek and compact USB fan features three adjustable speeds and a unique 5-blade design for optimal airflow. Perfect for your desk, it includes a foldable 180° support stand, allowing you to place it on any surface or hang it up for versatile cooling options


Ultra-Thin and Stylish Design: This battery-free USB fan measures 6.5 x 5.3 x 1.57 inches. Engineered with modern aesthetics in mind, it features a foldable stand for easy storage and portability. The sleek design seamlessly complements any home or office decor


Quiet Operation for Focused Work: Create a comfortable environment with our whisper-quiet USB desk fan. Perfect for studying or working, it ensures you stay cool without distracting noise. Ideal for both home and office settings where concentration is essential


Complete Package: Your purchase includes one premium USB desk fan with a detailed user manual and a Type C charging cable. The versatile design makes it perfect for use at home, office, or while traveling. Experience efficient cooling wherever you need it

title: Rechargeable Oscillating Standing Fan, Air Circulation Fan with remote control, Adjustable Height, 5 Speed Wind type-c fast charging/9 hours long-lasting timing
detail_text: 💖 Local Seller! Local Warranty! Fast Shipping! 💖 Hot Selling Air Circulation Fan! Stay cool and comfortable with our Air Circulation Fan. With adjustable height, 5 gear wind levels, and 3 timer settings, this fan provides optimal airflow tailored to your needs. Plus, it features convenient Type-C charging and built-in light, making it the perfect companion for any space. ✅Features: 👉 Design that allows the motor to provide strong and stable power 👉 Wind deflector 👉 Airfoil large inclination fan blade 👉 High efficiency 👉 Adjustable Height 👉 Build-in light design 👉 Remote control 👉 Low Noise 👉 3 Timer Levels (3/6/9 Hours) 👉 Touch function 👉 Rotatable fan head (90° upward, 140° side) ✅ Details: 👉Product Name: Multifunctional Circulation Fan 👉 Multi-angle air supply: shake head left and right / adjust up and down 👉 Power: 12W 👉 Use battery 18652 lithium battery 👉 Timing: 3H-6H-9H 👉 Charging connector: TYPE-C USB charging 👉 Charging voltage: 5V/3A Fan gear: 5 gears wind/3 gears timing 👉Product size: (Length) 260mm (Width) 260mm (Height) 858mm 👉Maximum Height: 84cm
detail_html:
💖 Local Seller! Local Warranty! Fast Shipping!

💖 Hot Selling Air Circulation Fan!

Stay cool and comfortable with our Air Circulation Fan. With adjustable height, 5 gear wind levels, and 3 timer settings, this fan provides optimal airflow tailored to your needs. Plus, it features convenient Type-C charging and built-in light, making it the perfect companion for any space.

✅Features:

👉 Design that allows the motor to provide strong and stable power

👉 Wind deflector

👉 Airfoil large inclination fan blade

👉 High efficiency

👉 Adjustable Height

👉 Build-in light design

👉 Remote control

👉 Low Noise

👉 3 Timer Levels (3/6/9 Hours)

👉 Touch function

👉 Rotatable fan head (90° upward, 140° side)

✅ Details:

👉Product Name: Multifunctional Circulation Fan

👉 Multi-angle air supply: shake head left and right / adjust up and down

👉 Power: 12W

👉 Use battery 18652 lithium battery

👉 Timing: 3H-6H-9H

👉 Charging connector: TYPE-C USB charging

👉 Charging voltage: 5V/3A Fan gear: 5 gears wind/3 gears timing

👉Product size: (Length) 260mm (Width) 260mm (Height) 858mm

👉Maximum Height: 84cm

detail_text: Plug Type：China 2 Flat Pins Plug Voltage: 220V Hertz: 50 Hz Suggestion: Working with Power Adapter Powerful yet Quiet Despite its strong airflow, the fan operates quietly, providing a peaceful environment without disturbing others. German Quality This electric fan is a product of Germany, known for its high-quality manufacturing standards, ensuring durability and longevity. Air Circulation The fan effectively circulates air, creating a comfortable environment by dispersing heat or coolness evenly. Versatile Use Ideal for home use, this fan can be placed on a table or used as a standing fan, making it versatile for different settings like dormitories or offices. Lightweight Design Its lightweight design makes it easy to move around, offering convenience in placement according to your needs.
detail_html:
Plug Type：China 2 Flat Pins Plug

Voltage: 220V

 Hertz: 50 Hz

 Suggestion: Working with Power Adapter

Powerful yet Quiet

Despite its strong airflow, the fan operates quietly, providing a peaceful environment without disturbing others.

German Quality

This electric fan is a product of Germany, known for its high-quality manufacturing standards, ensuring durability and longevity.

Air Circulation

The fan effectively circulates air, creating a comfortable environment by dispersing heat or coolness evenly.

Versatile Use

Ideal for home use, this fan can be placed on a table or used as a standing fan, making it versatile for different settings like dormitories or offices.

Lightweight Design

Its lightweight design makes it easy to move around, offering convenience in placement according to your needs.

aiTexts: This standing desk fan offers powerful air circulation with 3D airflow design and up/down adjustment for optimal comfort.
Compact and lightweight, it is easy to move and features a smart LCD touch control panel for intuitive use.
Operates quietly at 12dB, ensuring a peaceful environment for work or rest.
It includes 180° automatic oscillation and 90° tilt adjustment to cover a wide area efficiently.
Energy-efficient with a 40W rated power, ideal for year-round use in homes, dorms, or offices.
Supports air circulation purification and works well alongside other devices like humidifiers and heaters.

product.desc:
Plug Type：China 2 Flat Pins Plug

Voltage: 220V

 Hertz: 50 Hz

 Suggestion: Working with Power Adapter

Powerful yet Quiet

Despite its strong airflow, the fan operates quietly, providing a peaceful environment without disturbing others.

German Quality

This electric fan is a product of Germany, known for its high-quality manufacturing standards, ensuring durability and longevity.

Air Circulation

The fan effectively circulates air, creating a comfortable environment by dispersing heat or coolness evenly.

Versatile Use

Ideal for home use, this fan can be placed on a table or used as a standing fan, making it versatile for different settings like dormitories or offices.

Lightweight Design

Its lightweight design makes it easy to move around, offering convenience in placement according to your needs.
